headlines.description: France forward Ousmane Dembélé scored a first-half hat trick, including one off a feed from Kylian Mbappé, to help his team beat Norway 4-1 at the World Cup on Friday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dembélé hat-trick helps France past much-changed Norway

headlines.description: Senegal racked up the goals on 10-man Iraq in a 5-0 victory Friday that boosted their hopes of reaching the World Cup knockout stages.
headlines.shortLinkText: Senegal thrash Iraq, on course for knockouts
